info.name: PHPinfo Page - Detect
author: pdteam
daffainfo
meme-lord
dhiyaneshdk
wabafet
mastercho
info.description: PHPinfo page was detected. The output of the phpinfo() command can reveal sensitive and detailed PHP environment information.
info.remediation: Remove PHP Info pages from publicly accessible sites, or restrict access to authorized users only.

request:
GET //info.php HTTP/1.1
Host: 194-204-44-234.ip.elisa.ee
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 14) AppleWebKit/620.32 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.1.10 Safari/620.32
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 14) AppleWebKit/620.32 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/17.1.10 Safari/620.32' 'http://194-204-44-234.ip.elisa.ee//info.php'
